# dns-he-net_domain_zone (Data Source)

DNS domain zone

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve Domain Zone information.
data "dns-he-net_domain_zone" "example" {
  zone_id = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_id` (Number) dns.he.net domain zone id

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) domain zone name
